name: Cricket Montblanc
alt_names: モンブラン・クリケット
description: Montblanc Cricket (モンブラン・クリケット, Monburan Kuriketto) is an inhabitant of Jaya Island, living in a small home behind the facade of a castle. He is the distant descendant of Montblanc Norland. He and the Saruyama Alliance aided the Straw hats in getting to Skypiea.     (Source: One Piece Wiki)
